title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Allcargo Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Allcargo Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allcargo Logistics family as a Fleet Manager in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allcargo Logistics:
Allcargo Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allcargo Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
